name_cn:
❤️❤️Lady Dior My 4-Compartment Matte Badge
A profound insight into elegance and beauty. Stylish and soft, timeless yet modern.
Exquisitely crafted from matte calfskin, wrapped in the iconic quilted stitching, showcasing fine craftsmanship.
The strap includes ❤️🌟🍀 3 matching tone badges, an internal zip pocket and slip pocket.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 20 *16.5 * 8
Model: 6604
